click.name: Edit Corporate Client
click.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Company Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("title").hasError("required")) { Company name is required. }
Base Price Maintenance Threshold Cycles Critical Temp Limit

color.colorFunction: if (data['Demand Level'] === 'HIGH') { return '#F44336'; } else if (data['Demand Level'] === 'MEDIUM') { return '#FFC107'; } return '#4CAF50';

action.name: Add Garage
action.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Garage Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Garage name is required. }

settings.markdownTextPattern:
Latest Booking Information
Booking ID ${Booking ID}
Employee ${Employee}
License Plate ${License Plate}
Space ${Space}
Status {{${Status}}}

headerButton.name: Create Entry Barrier
headerButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Barrier Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Barrier name is required. }

actionCellButton.name: Edit Entry Barrier
actionCellButton.customHtml:
{{ dialogTitle }}
Barrier Name @if(entityFormGroup.get("entityFields").get("name").hasError("required")) { Barrier name is required. }

actionCellButton.name: Delete Entry Barrier

settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = 'Inactive'; if (value == 'true' || value == true) { text = 'Active'; color = '#303F9F'; backColor = '#E8EAF6'; } return `${text}`;

let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; let text = value; if (value == 'normal') { color = '#2E7D32'; backColor = '#E8F5E9'; } else if (value == 'recommended') { color = '#EF6C00'; backColor = '#FFF3E0'; } else if (value == 'critical') { color = '#C62828'; backColor = '#FFEBEE'; } return `${text.toUpperCase()}`;

config.title: Total Cycles

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value >= 85) { return '#FF5722'; } else if (value >= 60) { return '#FFCA28'; } else { return '#4CAF50'; }

config.title: Booking System Status
Price per Hour

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number' && value >= 90) { return '#F44336'; } else if (value >= 75) { return '#FFC107'; } else { return '#4CAF50'; }

settings.cellContentFunction: let color = '#757575'; let backColor = '#F5F5F5'; if (value == 'pending') { color = '#616161'; backColor = '#EEEEEE'; } else if (value == 'confirmed') { color = '#1976D2'; backColor = '#E3F2FD'; } else if (value == 'active') { color = '#388E3C'; backColor = '#E8F5E9'; } else if (value == 'completed') { color = '#455A64'; backColor = '#ECEFF1'; } return `${value}`;

let color = (value == 'true' || value == true) ? '#388E3C' : '#D32F2F'; let backColor = (value == 'true' || value == true) ? '#E8F5E9' : '#FFEBEE'; let text = (value == 'true' || value == true) ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'; return `${text}`;

color.colorFunction: if (data['Maintenance Status'] === 'critical') { return '#F44336'; } else if (data['Maintenance Status'] === 'recommended') { return '#FF9800'; } return '#4CAF50';

barColor.colorFunction: if (typeof value === 'number') { if (value >= 100) return '#f44336'; if (value >= 80) return '#ff9800'; return '#4caf50'; } return '#bdbdbd';

config.title: Occupancy Status

settings.markdownTextPattern:
Barrier Information
Name${Name}
Status{{${Status} ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}}
Maintenance${Maintenance}
Total Cycles${Total Cycles:0}
Wear Level${Wear Level:1}%

Sensor Configuration
Name ${Sensor Name}
Label ${Label}
Status {{${Status} ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}}
X Position ${X Position:1}
Y Position ${Y Position:1}
